title: Data Agent Topics Manifest
description: The manifest of topics associated with a data source. Maps each topic's stable id to its human-readable markdown file name. The topic bodies live in sibling .md files referenced by fileName.

$schema.description: The schema version of the topics manifest file (e.g., "1.0.0").

topics.description: The list of topics for this data source, sorted by id for deterministic export.

items.title: Data Agent Topic
items.description: Represents a single topic and the markdown file that holds its body. The topic's display name and description live in the markdown YAML frontmatter of the body file, not in this manifest.

id.description: The stable, rename-safe identifier of the topic (a GUID).

fileName.description: The file name of the topic body in OneLake (e.g., "company-policies.md"). Must end with ".md", contain only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores, and be unique within the data source. Maximum length is 256 characters.
